## This is 

NEW LAYER.

We’ve set out to create uncompromising, conscious and performing skincare products for an active life, all while minimalizing our eco footprint. Since day one, we’ve operated under the mantra, “Good for You, Good for the Planet”.

![Image 20](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0525/4935/3624/files/svg_weather-smart.svg?v=1620839553)

Weather-Smart 

 Our formulas are tailored to weather conditions, providing optimal protection and care - always 

![Image 21](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0525/4935/3624/files/svg_fast_absorption.svg)

Instant, Lasting Protection & Care 

 Quickly absorbing without a trace while providing long-lasting protection and care instantly 

![Image 22](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0525/4935/3624/files/svg_reef_friendly.svg)

Reef-Friendly For Happy Ocean Life 

 Free of harming ingredients like oxybenzones, avobenzones, octocrylenes or nano particles 

![Image 23](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0525/4935/3624/files/svg_vegan.svg)

100% Vegan 

 Obviously ... why would you put animal products in skin care anyways?
